summary: Tested 3 new features for StockBud: 1) AI seasonal analysis with gemini-3-flash-preview + 30s timeout, 2) season_boost field in item-buffers/categorize, 3) sessionStorage auth tokens. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend login and sessionStorage verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ POST /api/ai/seasonal-analysis now uses gemini-3-flash-preview model with 30s asyncio.wait_for timeout
✓ POST /api/item-buffers/categorize adds season_boost field to each buffer document (line 3970)
✓ GET /api/item-buffers returns season_boost per item (verified in DB and API response)
✓ All 11 frontend pages updated to use sessionStorage.getItem('token') instead of localStorage
✓ No remaining localStorage.getItem('token') or localStorage.setItem('token') in codebase
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three features verified: 1) AI seasonal-analysis endpoint uses gemini-3-flash-preview with 30s timeout (fallback message on timeout), 2) item-buffers/categorize returns season_boost field per item (ratio of seasonal velocity to overall velocity), 3) sessionStorage is used for auth tokens instead of localStorage, enabling independent sessions per browser tab. All frontend pages switched from localStorage to sessionStorage for token storage.

test_classes: TestSeasonalAnalysis (1 test) - POST /api/ai/seasonal-analysis returns within 30s with ai_insights, recommendations, seasonal_items
TestItemBuffersCategorize (2 tests) - POST categorize + GET item-buffers shows season_boost
TestAuthWithoutLogin (2 tests) - Protected endpoints require auth

item_buffers_season_boost.description: ratio of seasonal velocity to overall velocity (>1 means seasonal demand higher)

changes: 11 frontend pages updated from localStorage to sessionStorage
session_storage_auth.frontend_test_result: Token stored in sessionStorage (144 chars), NOT in localStorage
session_storage_auth.benefits: Each browser tab has independent auth session - no session mixing

playwright_test_results.sessionStorage_token: PASS - Token stored in sessionStorage (length: 144 chars)
